Variables.Name: ComponentLayerInfos
Variables.Description: List of layers painted on this component. Matches the WeightmapLayerAllocations array in the LandscapeComponent.

Variables.Name: SectionBaseX
Variables.Description: Offset of component in landscape quads

Variables.Name: CollisionSizeQuads
Variables.Description: Size of component in collision quads

Variables.Name: SimpleCollisionSizeQuads
Variables.Description: Size of component's "simple collision" in collision quads

Variables.Name: CollisionQuadFlags
Variables.Description: The flags for each collision quad. See ECollisionQuadFlags.

Variables.Name: HeightfieldGuid
Variables.Description: Guid used to share PhysX heightfield objects in the editor

Variables.Name: CachedLocalBox
Variables.Description: Cached local-space bounding box, created at heightmap update time

Variables.Name: CookedPhysicalMaterials
Variables.Description: This is a list of physical materials that is actually used by a cooked HeightField
